title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete
scenario: Verify account deletion flow in App Settings: Cancel dismisses dialog and keeps user logged in, while Confirm deletes account, logs user out, and removes them from the Cloud tenant.
steps: Open the delete icon in App Settings under General > Account tab.
Test Cancel: Click Cancel on the dialog.
Verify the dialog closes, user stays logged in, and user remains on the Cloud tenant.
Test Confirm: Click Confirm on the dialog.
Verify the dialog closes, a spinner appears, an 'Account Deleted' popup appears briefly, then the user is logged out and removed from the Cloud tenant.
expected: Cancel: Dialog closes, user stays logged in, user remains on Cloud tenant. Confirm: Dialog closes, spinner appears, "Account Deleted" popup appears briefly, user is logged out and removed from Cloud tenant.
